proposals.reason: Move player x position to the expected goal marker to address visual alignment evidence.

rationale.expected_effect: Align player visual position with goal marker so the visual gate can transition from fail to pass on rerun.
rationale.reasoning_summary: The proposal is derived from fixture-scoped visual comparison evidence and remains a manual-review scene-only mutation candidate.

rationale.selection_reason: visual_mismatch maps to a bounded scene mutation; backlog is read-only selection evidence
